sections.title: Want To / Wanted To — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Want To / Wanted To — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Want To / Wanted To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + want/wants to (present) / wanted to (past) + base verb. Rules: 'Want to' shows present desire, 'Wanted to' shows past desire | Same agreement rules as 'want' — wants for he/she/it | Negative: do not want to / did not want to | This is a combined revision of Days 11 and 12 with 'to + verb' focus
sections.formula: Subject + want/wants to (present) / wanted to (past) + base verb

examples.hindi: मुझे यह सीखना है।
examples.english: I want to learn this.

examples.hindi: मुझे यह सीखना था।
examples.english: I wanted to learn this.

examples.hindi: वह डॉक्टर बनना चाहता है।
examples.english: He wants to become a doctor.

examples.hindi: वह डॉक्टर बनना चाहता था।
examples.english: He wanted to become a doctor.

examples.hindi: हम travel करना चाहते हैं।
examples.english: We want to travel.

examples.hindi: हम travel करना चाहते थे।
examples.english: We wanted to travel.

sections.title: Want To / Wanted To — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Want To / Wanted To — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Want To / Wanted To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + want/wants to (present) / wanted to (past) + base verb

examples.hindi: मैं यह किताब पढ़ना चाहता हूँ।
examples.english: I want to read this book.

examples.hindi: मैं यह किताब पढ़ना चाहता था।
examples.english: I wanted to read this book.

examples.hindi: वह यह नौकरी करना चाहती है।
examples.english: She wants to do this job.

examples.hindi: वह यह नौकरी करना चाहती थी।
examples.english: She wanted to do this job.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम यह करना चाहते हो?
examples.english: Do you want to do this?

examples.hindi: क्या तुम यह करना चाहते थे?
examples.english: Did you want to do this?

sections.title: Want To / Wanted To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Want To / Wanted To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Want To / Wanted To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + want/wants to (present) / wanted to (past) + base verb

examples.hindi: वे success पाना चाहते हैं।
examples.english: They want to achieve success.

examples.hindi: वे success पाना चाहते थे।
examples.english: They wanted to achieve success.

examples.hindi: मैं यह मौका लेना चाहता हूँ।
examples.english: I want to take this opportunity.

examples.hindi: मैं यह मौका लेना चाहता था।
examples.english: I wanted to take this opportunity.

sections.title: Want To / Wanted To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Want To / Wanted To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Want To / Wanted To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + want/wants to (present) / wanted to (past) + base verb

examples.hindi: वह यह सच जानना चाहता है।
examples.english: He wants to know the truth.

examples.hindi: वह यह सच जानना चाहता था।
examples.english: He wanted to know the truth.

examples.hindi: हम इसे बेहतर बनाना चाहते हैं।
examples.english: We want to make this better.

examples.hindi: हम इसे बेहतर बनाना चाहते थे।
examples.english: We wanted to make this better.
